title: polystichum aculeatum var. zerophyllum
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. zerophyllum, also known as the spiny wood fern, is a variety of fern native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the spiny wood fern is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
